title: Rubus radula microgene trachycaulon
taxonomy: Rubus radula microgene trachycaulon is a type of blackberry, specifically a hybrid species within the genus Rubus. It belongs to the family Rosaceae and is native to the Mediterranean region. The classification of Rubus radula microgene trachycaulon includes its species as a variant of the more general species Rubus radula. This classification is based on its unique characteristics and genetic makeup. Rubus radula microgene trachycaulon is often considered a taxonomic variant within the broader species category.
